details.reasoning: Perfect implementation meeting all rubric requirements: (1) ImageTextToTextPipeline class with async _call method present, (2) accepts image and text prompt parameters, (3) imports and uses AutoModelForImageTextToText, (4) calls this.model.generate() for text generation, (5) processes pixel_values from processor and returns objects with generated_text property, (6) registered in SUPPORTED_TASKS as 'image-text-to-text' with type 'multimodal', (7) comprehensive JSDoc with @typedef for ImageTextToTextSingle and ImageTextToTextOutput, (8) follows existing pipeline patterns (extends Pipeline, uses prepareImages, tokenizer.batch_decode, etc.), (9) only adds new code without modifying existing pipelines. The example in JSDoc demonstrates proper usage with Xenova/llava-v1.5-7b model.
